# ComEngineering Services

> Software engineering services specializing in full-stack development, mobile applications, and AI integration.

## About

ComEngineering Services is a software development company that builds web applications, mobile apps, and enterprise solutions. We prioritize client collaboration and are flexible with time zone communications.

## Services

- Full-Stack Web Development (React, Next.js, NestJS, Django, Express)
- Mobile Application Development (Flutter for iOS and Android)
- Blockchain Development (Ethereum, Solidity)
- AI/ML Integration (OpenAI, TensorFlow, Hugging Face)
- Cloud & DevOps (AWS, Azure, Docker)
- Database Design (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL)

## Tech Stack

React, Next.js, NestJS, Flutter, TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, Docker, AWS, Azure, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Firebase, TailwindCSS, Redux, TensorFlow, OpenAI, Pinecone

## Projects

- RecruitEasy: AI-powered recruitment platform for candidate matching
- Commercio: Blockchain-based e-commerce platform
- ShipGo: Luggage delivery service web and mobile apps
- SabSuno: Collaborative audiobook platform with web, portal, and mobile apps
- GermanExcel: Online German language exam preparation platform
- HTTP Server in Rust: Custom HTTP server implementation

## Contact

- Website: https://comengineering.services
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/coms-advance-engineering-llc
